name: ege-tasks-manager
description: EGE Tasks Manager - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,PDF,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:pdf" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd pocketbase && npm install && cd ../ege-tasks && npm install
